steps.title: Identify the specific goal
steps.content: The student wants to identify the combined carrying capacity of Belgium's merchant ships in 2021. The relevant note states that the combined DWT of those ships was 9.6 million tons. A correct answer must state that capacity figure directly.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• "In 2021, Belgium had 201 merchant ships hired to carry cargo or passengers.": Reports only the ship count (201), not the combined capacity. ✗
  • "The carrying capacity of a merchant ship is also known as its deadweight tonnage.": Defines a term but gives no capacity figure for Belgium's fleet. ✗
  • "The combined carrying capacity of Belgium's merchant ships was 9.6 million tons in 2021.": Directly states the combined carrying capacity (9.6 million tons) for the correct year (2021), satisfying the goal precisely. ✓
  • "There were a total of 201 merchant ships (ships hired to carry cargo or passengers) registered in Belgium in 2021.": Again gives only a ship count with a definition in parentheses; no capacity figure. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
